title: Move blind box / animal UI into workspace
description: Move the existing blind box / animal controls from setup_ui into a dedicated workspace builder while preserving widget attributes and command behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The single-line comma input syntax remains unchanged.
Start extraction, clear input, auto-paste, copy result, and history reset buttons still work.
The old action-row expression button is removed from this workspace.
convergence: Keep existing attribute names: input_entry, state_var, category_vars, category_spin_vars, animal_vars, animal_spin_vars, auto_paste_var, output_text.
